title: SlideEvent
description: One NDJSON line written to --events-out per saved slide. Required fields are always present; optional fields are omitted when the relevant capability (OCR, transcription, frontmost-app) has not yet landed.

slide_id.description: Timestamp-based identifier derived from the PNG filename without extension (e.g. '20260415T130050Z'). Unique within a session.

path.description: Absolute filesystem path of the saved PNG.

t_start_ms.description: Unix epoch time in milliseconds at the moment capture of this frame began.

t_end_ms.description: Unix epoch time in milliseconds at the moment the PNG was fully written to disk.

ocr.description: OCR words extracted from the frame (populated by 🎯T10.2; omitted until then).

bbox.description: Bounding box as [x, y, width, height] in normalised 0–1 coordinates relative to the frame.

transcript_window.description: Audio transcript segments active at the time of capture (populated by 🎯T9.2; omitted until then).

start_ms.description: Segment start time in milliseconds since Unix epoch.

end_ms.description: Segment end time in milliseconds since Unix epoch.

frontmost_app.description: Bundle ID or display name of the application in the foreground at capture time (populated by 🎯T10.3; omitted until then).
